locations.name: Palace

vehicles.name: South Gate
vehicles.description: Check the south gate road before leaving the palace grounds.

vehicles.name: East Road
vehicles.description: Reliable rotation toward Terminal or School.

loot.notes: Good squad loot with multiple escape paths.

locations.description: Large central compound with strong loot and open-field exits.

locations.name: Terminal
aliases: เทอร์มินัล

vehicles.name: Runway Road
vehicles.description: Road spawn near runway for long rotations.

vehicles.name: North Parking
vehicles.description: Backup vehicle line with better cover.

loot.notes: Wide angles make early scouting important.

locations.description: High-value airport area with long lines of sight.

locations.name: School
aliases: โรงเรียนแทโก

vehicles.name: Main Road
vehicles.description: Vehicle line outside the school compound.

loot.notes: Balanced drop for players who want early control without Terminal chaos.

locations.description: Central school area with stable loot and decent rotations.

locations.name: Ho San

vehicles.name: West Road
vehicles.description: Use this for coastal or central rotations.

vehicles.name: South Bridge Road
vehicles.description: Backup spawn when fighting spreads through town.

loot.notes: Large enough for squad splits but dangerous if teams collapse from both roads.

locations.description: Dense town with strong loot and flexible rotations.

locations.name: Shipyard

vehicles.name: North Road
vehicles.description: Primary escape route from the shipyard.

vehicles.name: Dock Road
vehicles.description: Check by the docks if north road is contested.

loot.notes: Good loot but rotations can be long if the circle pulls center.

locations.description: Coastal loot zone with containers and warehouse fights.

secret_rooms.name: Taego Secret Room
secret_rooms.loot: Crate-tier weapons, self AED, armor, scopes, meds, and high-value attachments.
secret_rooms.notes: Keys are rare world spawns; secure a vehicle before detouring.
